codeReview.summary: The feature was implemented as requested. The apps/scanner directory was created, configured with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and the ABYSSE theme matching the dashboard's. A Coming Soon page with the Galileo logo, required fonts, and text was added. The dev server is configured for port 3001. All tests and linters pass.

summary: The scanner-shell feature was successfully implemented. The implementation exactly matches the feature description: creating a minimal Next.js app in apps/scanner, configuring the ABYSSE theme, and setting up a placeholder 'Coming Soon' page with specific fonts and colors running on port 3001. Code changes are clean, tests pass, and no shared state gaps were observed.
